records.m_Talk_ENG: That's it...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's it...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's it...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've wasted five years looking for you for this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've wasted five years looking for you for this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've wasted five years looking for you for this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You left me alone. You took away my life and family...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You left me alone. You took away my life and family...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You left me alone. You took away my life and family...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you're only going to talk about yourself, even in the end?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you're only going to talk about yourself, even in the end?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you're only going to talk about yourself, even in the end?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you were going to be like this...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you were going to be like this...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you were going to be like this...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you were going to show up like this after taking my daughter away...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you were going to show up like this after taking my daughter away...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you were going to show up like this after taking my daughter away...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... you should've just died five years ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... you should've just died five years ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... you should've just died five years ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all you did to me...! Without even an explanation...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all you did to me...! Without even an explanation...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all you did to me...! Without even an explanation...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How could you be so brazen... and talk about family and regret?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How could you be so brazen... and talk about family and regret?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How could you be so brazen... and talk about family and regret?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Does it hurt?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Does it hurt?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Does it hurt?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, did I wake you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, did I wake you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, did I wake you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd heard that crying too much hurts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd heard that crying too much hurts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd heard that crying too much hurts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In here. He said that the heart hurts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In here. He said that the heart hurts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In here. He said that the heart hurts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Shepherd doesn't know. Shepherd can't feel pain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Shepherd doesn't know. Shepherd can't feel pain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Shepherd doesn't know. Shepherd can't feel pain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm all right. It hurts sometimes, but not to the point of death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm all right. It hurts sometimes, but not to the point of death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm all right. It hurts sometimes, but not to the point of death.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... what do you mean you can't feel pain?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... what do you mean you can't feel pain?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... what do you mean you can't feel pain?

records.m_Talk_ENG: People feel pain in their hearts. But Shepherd lost Shepherd's heart, so no pain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: People feel pain in their hearts. But Shepherd lost Shepherd's heart, so no pain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: People feel pain in their hearts. But Shepherd lost Shepherd's heart, so no pain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's what <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to Shepherd</color> said.

records.m_Talk_FRA: That's what <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to Shepherd</color> said.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd, could you do me a favor and lie on the scanner for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd, could you do me a favor and lie on the scanner for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd, could you do me a favor and lie on the scanner for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The thing that goes, "snap, snap" when Shepherd lies down, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The thing that goes, "snap, snap" when Shepherd lies down, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The thing that goes, "snap, snap" when Shepherd lies down, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd did this many times before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd did this many times before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd did this many times before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, it'll only be a second.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, it'll only be a second.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, it'll only be a second.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her body is mostly synthetic organs or machinery.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her body is mostly synthetic organs or machinery.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her body is mostly synthetic organs or machinery.

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's enough to define her as non-human.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Dammit.

root.m_Talk_FRA: That's what <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to Shepherd</color> said.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd, could you do me a favor and lie on the scanner for me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd, could you do me a favor and lie on the scanner for me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd, could you do me a favor and lie on the scanner for me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...The thing that goes, "snap, snap" when Shepherd lies down, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...The thing that goes, "snap, snap" when Shepherd lies down, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...The thing that goes, "snap, snap" when Shepherd lies down, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd did this many times before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd did this many times before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd did this many times before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, it'll only be a second.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, it'll only be a second.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, it'll only be a second.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Her body is mostly synthetic organs or machinery.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Her body is mostly synthetic organs or machinery.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Her body is mostly synthetic organs or machinery.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's enough to define her as non-human.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's enough to define her as non-human.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's enough to define her as non-human.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those crazy bastards. What have they done to the child in the name of science?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those crazy bastards. What have they done to the child in the name of science?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those crazy bastards. What have they done to the child in the name of science?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's that inside her chest...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's that inside her chest...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's that inside her chest...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Danger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Danger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Danger.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's coming. You have to run.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's coming. You have to run.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's coming. You have to run.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's coming...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's coming...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's coming...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The dimension surface is opening?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The dimension surface is opening?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The dimension surface is opening?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is it a ship warp?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is it a ship warp?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it a ship warp?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, it's different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, it's different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, it's different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's as if something is trying to force it open...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's as if something is trying to force it open...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's as if something is trying to force it open...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Dammit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Dammit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Dammit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd! Run!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd! Run!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd! Run!
